---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a theme option, component redesign, or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like?**
Describe the feature. A reference screenshot / mockup of the look you're
after helps a lot.

**Why?**
What problem does it solve in your admin panel?

**Anything else?**
Workarounds you tried, related issues, etc.
